CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2007 Continued To Jun-12-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Feb-20-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Scott A. Gursky, Esq., for for Plaintiff: L.A. Commercial Group with Witness: Scott Newman.
Christopher Ahearn, Esq., for Defendant: West End Management, Inc., with Witness: Peter Nantell.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendant will pay the Plaintiff $900.00 as full settlement amount before Dec. 31, 2006. In addition, a Mutual Release, to be prepared by Counsel, will be signed by Defendant and Plaintiff's Assignor. A Dismissal will be filed by the Plaintiff no later than 30 days.
Parties agreed to these terms in open court.
Matter is placed on the CRC-225 Calendar on Feb. 20, 2007, at 10:00 A.M. in Dept. 212 for Order to Show Cause re: Dismissal.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2006 Set For Trial On Dec-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
